message:
Fix ensureConnection timeout race for orphaned WebSockets (#4938)

The timeout handler in ensureConnection called ws.close() without first
nullifying onclose/onerror handlers.  This caused the onclose handler to
fire and schedule a reconnection, creating a second (orphaned) WebSocket
connection.  Similarly, the onerror handler rejected the Promise but
never closed the socket or cleared wsRef, leaving zombie connections.

Changes:
- Timeout handler now nullifies onclose, onerror, onopen, and onmessage
  before calling close(), preventing cascading reconnection attempts
- onerror handler now nullifies onclose, closes the socket, clears
  wsRef.current, and resets agentsLoading state
- Extracted magic number 5000 into WS_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS constant

Fixes #4929

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
